summary: AtBat subscriber ESPN/Sunday Night Baseball archive - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN a user has AtBat entitlements
AND ESPN Sunday Night Baseball is archived

AtBat entitlements = MLBAUDIO, IPHONEATBAT, ANDROIDATBAT, SUBSCRIBERVOD

steps.action: WHEN the user views the game tile focused or unfocused
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon displays in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND there is a dark overlay of the team match up
